content.problemStatement:
In this task, you are required to create a simple **Contact List Manager** program in C++. The program will allow the user to add contacts to a contact list. Each contact will consist of a name and a phone number, and each contact will be appended to a file ensuring that the previous contacts are not overwritten.

- The program should use ofstream in append mode so that new contacts are added to the end of the file without modifying any existing contacts.
- The program will take exactly two contacts from the user. For each contact, the program should ask for the name and phone number.
- The contacts should be written to a file named contacts.txt.

**After running the program, review the contents of contacts.txt to verify that the contacts are successfully added.**
